message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "dragon-material sword, enchantment 8, damage 1000 G — payout 400 G"
Expected: {payout: 400, remainingCap: 1600}
Current error: {payout: 900, remainingCap: 1100}
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

Fix: 50% rule applies when enchantment >= 8 regardless of material (dragon only wins when enchantment < 8). 
Update triggersHighEnchantmentRule: just check enchantment >= 8 (no material check).

But wait - we also need to keep the dragon clause working. Re-read the spec:
- "Damage to items with enchantment level ≥ 8 is reimbursed at 50% of the damage amount."
- "Damage to items made of dragon material is fully reimbursed."
- "high-enchantment clause applies, then deductible" for enchantment 8 dragon
- "the 50 % rule wins, then deductible" for enchantment 9 dragon

So: high-enchantment (>=8) clause WINS over dragon material. Dragon material is only meaningful when enchantment < 8 (full reimbursement instead of e.g. some other reduction - but currently full is the default).

So the simplest fix: just remove the material!="dragon" check from triggersHighEnchantmentRule. The high-enchantment rule is just enchantment >= 8.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the current implementation and apply the minimal fix.
Now I'll apply the minimal fix - remove the dragon material check from `triggersHighEnchantmentRule`.

content.text:
All 30 active tests pass. The fix was minimal - just removed the dragon material exclusion from the high-enchantment rule check.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Removed the `&& item?.material !== DRAGON_MATERIAL` check from `triggersHighEnchantmentRule` in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-21_08-35-47_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts`
**Result**: All tests now pass (30 passing, 16 todo)
**Approach**: This is minimal because the spec states the high-enchantment (>=8) rule applies regardless of material - dragon material no longer overrides it. The simplest change is to remove the material exclusion from the predicate.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
